title: lactuca hirsuta var. genuina
intro: Lactuca hirsuta var. genuina, also known as hairy wild lettuce, is a plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Lactuca hirsuta var. genuina include soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and supporting respiratory health. The herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to leverage its medicinal properties and health benefits.
